interpretation: Proof-card audit converts every finite theorem obligation into a compact auditable claim/proof-kind/state-count record and checks that the cards exactly account for the executable theorem kernel.

proof_cards.claim: Adding an enforced CSP policy cannot authorize a script edge that one enforced member blocks.
Enforced CSP-policy conjunction is commutative and idempotent over the encoded source-list fragment.
Adding a source expression to one source list cannot remove an allowed script edge before policy meet is applied.
Script-element source selection follows script-src-elem, then script-src, then default-src, then the uncovered default.
A report-only CSP surface yields monitoring conflict under an enforcement intent but no enforced block judgment.
Credentialed CORS shareability is exact-origin plus byte-case-sensitive ACAC, and wildcard excludes credentials.
A response with multiple ACAO values is not shareable in the encoded CORS fragment.
Dynamic ACAO requires an Origin discriminator; unrelated Vary fields do not repair the cache obligation.
Only an Origin token, not a substring, repairs dynamic ACAO cache partitioning.
HSTS processing partitions into insecure-delivery ignore, invalid-header ignore, zero-age clear, and valid-state cases.
The documented preload-control predicate is exactly max-age>=31536000 plus includeSubDomains plus preload in the encoded fragment.
CORS response headers alone do not repair a no-cors COEP resource edge; compatible CORP repairs the no-cors edge.
Cross-origin isolation preconditions require the encoded COOP/COEP pair and are disabled by an explicit Permissions-Policy denial.
CORP scope is ordered same-origin <= same-site <= cross-origin over the fixture origin approximation.
CORP same-site delegates exactly to the fixture same-site approximation.
Empty allowlists deny a feature and wildcard/explicit external entries over-allow a denied origin in the encoded fragment.
A Permissions-Policy directive affects only its named feature in the encoded fragment.
Append preserves fields, set replaces same-name fields, and remove deletes same-name fields before semantic evaluation.
A release remove absorbs same-name fields, a release set replaces same-name fields, and unrelated fields are preserved.
Known encoded fragments execute without exception under irrelevant context extensions.
Header-name canonicalization is idempotent over encoded policy fields.
Policy header lookup is case-insensitive while preserving values.
Encoded CSP source expressions have exact wildcard, none, self, scheme, host, and subdomain boundaries.
Report-only CSP fields neither enforce nor weaken an enforced CSP field in the encoded script-load fragment.
Wildcard ACAO remains shareable for non-credentialed modeled requests regardless of ACAC noise.
Duplicate ACAO rejection is invariant to header order.
The HSTS preload predicate is robust to directive case/spacing and rejects below-threshold age.
CORP cross-origin is the top element of the encoded CORP scope lattice.
Ordering independent Permissions-Policy directives does not change the queried feature judgment.
Headers outside the encoded policy vocabulary do not affect known fragment judgments.
